goal: Harden tools/orphan-scan.cjs so verification can run without hidden file writes. Add explicit --check and --write modes: --check computes the report in memory, compares it with docs/ORPHAN-CENSUS-v0.1.md and exits non-zero if stale without writing; --write regenerates the report. Default no-arg behavior must be read-only check. Refresh docs/ORPHAN-CENSUS-v0.1.md to the current WIRE-SLICE-001 state.
scope_out: Do not change builder runtime code, routes, tests or package files. Do not change orphan connectivity semantics. Do not alter verify-task-lock behavior. This task only separates orphan-scan read/check/write modes and refreshes the human-readable report.
claims: orphan-scan --check is read-only and exits 0 only when docs/ORPHAN-CENSUS-v0.1.md matches the in-memory rendered report.
Running orphan-scan with no mode is read-only and behaves like --check.
The refreshed report reflects WIRE-SLICE-001: 304 modules, 222 non-live, and the dispatch chain modules are non_live_value_referenced with dispatchDryRunSlice as used value importer.
assumptions: WIRE-SLICE-001 landed on this branch at 9cb282f.
The scanner render function can be reused in-memory without changing connectivity logic.
The report file is allowed in this task, unlike WIRE-SLICE-001.
dod: tools/orphan-scan.cjs accepts --check and --write; unknown args fail with usage.
No-arg node tools/orphan-scan.cjs is read-only and does not write docs/ORPHAN-CENSUS-v0.1.md.
--check exits non-zero and prints stale guidance when the report differs; it does not mutate the report.
tools/orphan-scan-mode.test.cjs covers no-arg read-only behavior, stale --check, and --write refresh in temporary fixtures.
docs/ORPHAN-CENSUS-v0.1.md is updated to the current WIRE-SLICE-001 state.
node --test tools/orphan-scan-mode.test.cjs, node tools/orphan-scan.cjs --check, node tools/verify-task-lock.cjs WIRE-SCAN-002 --verify and git diff --check pass.
stop_conditions: Changing builder/src or builder/tests becomes necessary.
Changing orphan connectivity semantics becomes necessary.
